Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories And Further Responses To Request For Production; Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-21-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Caesar del Pilar, Atty appeared telephonically for Plaintiff and Moving party: Department of Fair Employment and Housing
Stacey Lucas, Atty. for Defendant and opposing party: City and County of San Francisco

RULING: After hearing, Plaintiff Department Of Fair Employment And Housing's Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories And Further Responses To Requests For Production, And Request For Sanctions is GRANTED, limited to discrimination and retaliation related to accomodation. Review by DFEH at the City Attorney's Office. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.
